reviews.comment:
El servicio del chico del full (Xavier) es excelente. El pibe se banca solo todo. Atiende la gente del motel, full y los clientes que dejan las del restaurante malondonas que te cierran la puerta en la cara, ni te contestan una simple pregunta, y te miran con cara de orto. La concesión del restaurante que se la den a otro. Todo mérito del pibe.

(Translated by Google)
The service from the guy at the full house (Xavier) is excellent. The guy handles everything himself. He serves the people from the motel, the full house, and the customers left behind by the rude restaurant owners who slam the door in your face, don't even answer a simple question, and just give you dirty looks. They should give the restaurant concession to someone else. It's all the kid's credit.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSejVMSU53EAE
